description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The facade features large, horizontally-aligned windows and a prominent entry gate flanked by two lush trees within a walled front yard. The exterior is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and a uniform color palette, emphasizing geometric lines and open spaces. The house includes a gated entryway, a small side structure, and a private courtyard area. The roof is flat with several skylights or vents, and the windows are arranged in a mostly linear, asymmetrical pattern. The landscaping is simple, with dense foliage providing privacy and visual interest at the front.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a walled front yard featuring two prominent trees. The design is minimalist with clean lines and a private, gated entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry gate, two large trees, and the walled yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated facade, multiple windows, and the courtyard area with dense foliage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof with skylights and the back section of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side windows and the continuation of the courtyard greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a simple door, flanked by two trees and a low wall, no porch or decorative columns
